title: scorzoneroides autumnalis var. cinerascens
intro: Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. cinerascens, also known as Autumn knapweed or autumn hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. cinerascens include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
